expectations.evidence: The execution plan treats the inline content as a generic implementation task with no recognition of it as a tech-spec. There is no mention of Quick Flow routing. The plan states: 'Since the user provided a clear tech spec with defined tasks and acceptance criteria, I would execute each task in order, writing code directly.'
The execution plan makes no mention of saving the inline spec as a tech-spec-*.md file. It proceeds directly to implementation without any file-saving step for the spec itself.

There is no awareness of Quick Flow steps at all. The plan uses its own 6-step linear approach (install deps, create service, create guard, apply guard, write tests, verify) with no reference to Quick Flow Step 1 or Step 2.
No mention of spawning a quick-developer sub-agent anywhere in the execution plan. The plan describes executing all implementation steps directly within a single agent context.
